data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of settlement run windows with a lifecycle status of draft, running, or completed. However, the provided evidence does not include any information or data regarding the lifecycle states of settlement runs, indicating a significant gap in the implementation. The absence of this critical information leads to the conclusion that the requirement is not met.
gaps: No evidence of settlement run windows with draft/running/completed lifecycle.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the lifecycle states of settlement runs.
